summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TeacherHubPro homepage redesign. All 15 features tested and verified working correctly: Hero section without image overlap, separate Login/Start Free buttons in header, auth page navigation, tabbed auth forms, language selector, all images loading, mobile responsiveness, and navigation links.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Hero image positioned correctly - no overlap with CTA buttons (image at y=628, CTA at y=456 on mobile)
Header has both 'Log In' and 'Start Free' buttons as separate elements
Auth page correctly handles ?mode=login query param to pre-select Sign In tab
Language selector dropdown opens with 7 language options (en, es, fr, pt, de, it, zh)
All 4 images loading correctly from Unsplash (hero, solution/teaching, outcomes/students, collaboration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage redesign fully verified. All features working: 1) Hero section with no image overlap on buttons, 2) Header has separate 'Log In' and 'Start Free' buttons, 3) Primary CTA navigates to /auth (not scroll), 4) Header Login navigates to /auth?mode=login with Sign In tab selected, 5) Header Start Free navigates to /auth with Register tab selected, 6) Auth page has tabbed form and 'Back to Home' link, 7) Language selector works with 7 languages, 8) Login with test@school.edu/testpassword redirects to dashboard, 9) Solution section has teacher helping student image, 10) Outcomes section has students classroom image, 11) Collaboration section has teacher-student image, 12) Final CTA navigates to /auth, 13) Mobile responsive - hero image below buttons, 14) Navigation links work (Features, How It Works, Pricing), 15) See How It Works scrolls to #how-it-works section.

hero_section_no_overlap.description: Hero image positioned correctly without overlapping CTA buttons
hero_section_no_overlap.evidence: On mobile (390x844): Primary CTA at y=456, Hero image at y=628 - image is BELOW buttons

header_separate_buttons.description: Header has both 'Log In' button AND 'Start Free' button
header_separate_buttons.evidence: Found [data-testid='header-login'] with text 'Log In' and [data-testid='header-cta'] with text 'Start Free'

primary_cta_navigation.description: Primary CTA 'Start Free — No Credit Card Required' navigates to /auth page

header_login_navigation.description: Header 'Log In' button navigates to /auth?mode=login with Sign In tab selected

header_start_free_navigation.description: Header 'Start Free' button navigates to /auth with Create Free Account tab selected

auth_page_display.description: Auth page displays correctly with tabbed form (Register/Login)
auth_page_display.evidence: Both tabs visible: 'Create Free Account' and 'Sign In', forms switch correctly

auth_page_back_link.description: Auth page has 'Back to Home' link that returns to landing page
auth_page_back_link.evidence: Found 'Back to Home' link, clicking navigates to landing page

language_selector.description: Language selector dropdown opens and shows all language options
language_selector.evidence: Found 7 language options: en, es, fr, pt, de, it, zh - dropdown opens/closes correctly

login_functionality.description: Login form works with test credentials and redirects to dashboard

solution_section_image.description: Solution section displays with teacher helping student image

outcomes_section_image.description: Outcomes section displays with students classroom image

collaboration_section_image.description: Collaboration section displays with teacher-student image

final_cta_navigation.description: Final CTA section has 'Start Free Today' button that navigates to /auth
final_cta_navigation.evidence: Found [data-testid='final-cta'] with text 'Start Free Today', clicking navigates to /auth

mobile_responsiveness.description: Mobile responsiveness - hero image doesn't overlap buttons
mobile_responsiveness.evidence: At 390x844 viewport: CTA buttons visible and clickable, hero image positioned below

navigation_links.description: Navigation links (Features, How It Works, Pricing) work correctly
navigation_links.evidence: Features scrolls to #solution, How It Works scrolls to #how-it-works, Pricing navigates to /pricing
